abilities.name: swarm
abilities.shortEffect: Strengthens Bug moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon has 1/3 or less of its HP remaining, its Bug-type moves inflict 1.5× as much regular damage. Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is increased.
abilities.flavorText: Powers up Bug-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.

abilities.name: early-bird
abilities.shortEffect: Makes sleep pass twice as quickly.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's remaining sleep turn count falls by 2 rather than 1. If this Pokémon's sleep counter is at 1, it will fall to 0 and then the Pokémon will wake up.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon awakens from sleep twice as fast as other Pokémon.

abilities.name: iron-fist
abilities.shortEffect: Strengthens punch-based moves to 1.2× their power.
abilities.effect: Moves flagged as being punch-based have 1.2× their base power for this Pokémon. Sucker Punch is not flagged as punch-based; its original, Japanese name only means "surprise attack".
